title: I need to count weekend day on Date column
excerpt:
Hi, 
I want to create a Date column counting weekend days, when I have already create this column the weekend day are inavailable and I don’t know why, 
could you help me? 
Thank you

posts.author: Charlie92 (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi Carlos,

Did you check your weekend settings in Administration > General > Account?
